sections.name: Opportunities & Events

Plus fellowships/cohorts/hackathons. Includes OFFLINE events (summits, expos, exhibitions, seminars, festivals, sport). Examples: G7 in India, Olympics, India Art Fair, Jaipur Literature Festival. Only list items with a concrete date AND a working link; label clearly as beta.
